title: Exotic Trades
description: An economy plugin based on supply and demand
body:
![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e51b7947f90e6a817c7782a73eb45766b30abfb7.png)



<details>
<summary>Text description</summary>

Exotic trades is an economy plugin that introduces a dynamic trading system, offering players new ways to earn money while maintaining a vanilla feel

## Dynamic market system
Every sellable resources follows a unique supply-and-demand mechanic. The more an item is sold, the lower its price drops, encouraging players to seek out profitable trade oportunities instead of relying on a single source of income

There are two types of markets items
- Vanilla : Standard minecraft items that can be sold
- Rare items : Special items that randomly appear through player actions like mining , mob hunting, fishing and farming

## Traders & Market
Trader can be spawned to buy specific resources from players.
The market tracks recent transactions and dynamically adjusts prices based on sales history.
Admins can fine-tune price fluctuation settings through the config file.

</details>

[Join the plugin discord for suggestions or bug report !
](https://discord.gg/ZzEFaSfJ7x)
# Mandatory dependencies
- [Vault](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/vault.34315/)
- [SphereLib](https://modrinth.com/plugin/spherelib)

# Map support
- [Dynmap](https://modrinth.com/plugin/exotictrades-dynmap)
- [Squaremap](https://modrinth.com/plugin/exotictrades-squaremap)
- [Bluemap](https://modrinth.com/plugin/exotictrades-bluemap)

[Optional ressource pack (for all 5 base rare ressources)](https://github.com/Leralix/ExoticTrades/releases/tag/v0.2.0)
